commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR adds dynamic configured model choices and an argument menu to the native `/model` command, with registry tests and a catalog display-name type field.

PR surface: Source +27, Tests +35. Total +62 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding from source inspection: configure multiple `models.providers` rows but allow only a subset in `agents.defaults.models`; the PR menu lists provider catalog rows while the existing switch path enforces `allowedModelKeys`. I did not run a live Slack workspace reproduction.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The blocker is a narrow code/test repair on the PR branch: align `/model` menu choices with existing model visibility before automerge can proceed.

target.title: feat: add model switch choices to /model
target.author: clawsean

commands.reason: PR is paused for human review
